scripts.seed:admin: ("$HOME/.turso/turso" db shell xclusivetrip < scripts/seed-admin.sql) || (turso db shell xclusivetrip < scripts/seed-admin.sql)
scripts.seed:check: printf "SELECT id, email, role, created_at FROM users ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 5;\n" | (("$HOME/.turso/turso" db shell xclusivetrip) || (turso db shell xclusivetrip))
